shots.lyric: Intro A: 寒风穿过麦田
shots.pEn: Cinematic wide shot, Asian manga aesthetic, a desolate scarecrow silhouette in a vast withered wheat field, pale gray overcast sky, subtle wind blowing through dry straw, extremely melancholic atmosphere, hand-drawn ink textures.
shots.pCn: 电影全景，亚洲漫画美学，广袤麦田中的稻草人剪影，苍白阴天，忧郁氛围。
shots.motion: Extremely slow zoom out, reveal vastness of empty field.

shots.lyric: Intro B: 生锈的卡顿声
shots.pEn: Macro close-up, rusted metal wind-up key on the back of a scarecrow, aged copper texture, floating dust particles, anime style with hyper-detailed textures.
shots.pCn: 宏观特写，稻草人背部的生锈发条钥匙，陈旧铜纹理，漂浮灰尘。
shots.motion: Focus on the key, it jerks slightly and stays stuck, metallic shudder.

shots.lyric: Intro C: 胸口玫瑰破洞
shots.pEn: Extreme close-up, a rose-shaped hole on blue ragged fabric, dark hollow interior, few withered straw fibers leaking out, sorrowful aesthetic.
shots.pCn: 极细特写，蓝色罩衫上的玫瑰形孔洞，漆黑空洞，漏出秸秆。
shots.motion: Camera tilts up slowly from the hole to the chin.

shots.lyric: Intro D: 纽扣眼裂痕
shots.pEn: Macro shot of a silver button eye, mirror surface reflecting a pale moon, suddenly a sharp crack appears, faint amber light leaks from crack.
shots.pCn: 纽扣眼睛特写，反射残月，出现裂痕，透出微弱琥珀光。
shots.motion: Last second, the crack snaps open with a subtle glow.

shots.lyric: 月亮在云层里像一枚褪色的银币
shots.pEn: Low angle shot looking up at a hazy crescent moon behind thick ink-style clouds, desaturated colors, silver coins falling metaphor.
shots.pCn: 仰拍，厚重云层后的朦胧残月，低饱和度，如褪色银币。
shots.motion: Clouds drifting slowly across the moon.

shots.lyric: 我站在田埂中央守着这一方贫瘠
shots.pEn: Full shot, scarecrow standing alone on a narrow dirt path, surrounding wheat is grey and dry, heavy atmosphere, cinematic lighting.
shots.pCn: 全景，稻草人孤立在田埂，周围是灰色干枯麦田，沉重氛围。
shots.motion: Slow track right, emphasizing the isolation.

shots.lyric: 寒鸦嘲笑我的身体装满了枯黄的秘密
shots.pEn: Medium shot, black crows landing on the scarecrow's wooden arms, squawking animation, detailed feathers, ink strokes.
shots.pCn: 中景，黑鸦落在稻草人木质手臂上，鸣叫，羽毛细节。
shots.motion: Crow landing and fluttering wings.

shots.lyric: 风一吹就发出空洞的叹息
shots.pEn: Medium close shot, wind blowing through the scarecrow's hollow chest, straw dust particles flying in the wind, melancholic lighting.
shots.pCn: 中近景，风吹过空洞胸膛，飞出的秸秆粉尘，忧郁光效。
shots.motion: Subtle organic sway of the garment.

shots.lyric: 人们说智慧是一种闪光的硬物
shots.pEn: POV shot, looking at a distant village with warm glowing lights forming geometric sharp shapes, bokeh effect, contrast between cold field and warm lights.
shots.pCn: 主观视角，望向远方村庄，灯火如几何闪烁，焦外虚化。
shots.motion: Focus shifting from foreground straw to distant lights.

shots.lyric: 能看清远方的路和命运的地图
shots.pEn: Extreme wide shot, a golden glowing railway line appearing on the horizon like a map of destiny, ethereal glow, cinematic perspective.
shots.pCn: 极远景，地平线升起金色发光的轨道，如命运地图，空灵感。
shots.motion: Slow camera push forward along the ground.

shots.lyric: 我摸着胸口只有干燥的纤维和土
shots.pEn: Close-up of wooden fingers touching the edge of the chest hole, rough wood texture vs dry fabric, earthy tones.
shots.pCn: 特写，木质手指抚摸胸口孔洞，粗糙质感，大地色调。
shots.motion: Hand trembling slightly.

shots.lyric: 在每一个深夜把自己反复地缝补
shots.pEn: High angle shot, scarecrow's head down, scattered ropes and needles on the dark soil, moonlight shadow.
shots.pCn: 俯拍，稻草人垂头，地上散落麻绳，月光阴影。
shots.motion: Static, sorrowful stillness.

shots.lyric: 我不想要什么大脑 (Chorus)
shots.pEn: Action shot, scarecrow pulling its wooden leg out of the ground, black vines curling around the legs, transformation begins, dramatic motion blur.
shots.pCn: 动态镜头，拔出腿，黑色藤蔓缠绕，转化开始，动态模糊。
shots.motion: Powerful pull-up motion, ground cracks.

shots.lyric: 我宁愿在这荒野听风在麦浪里奔跑
shots.pEn: Tracking shot, scarecrow running through the field, background blurred into purple and dark blue lines, glowing blue lantern in hand.
shots.pCn: 跟拍，在麦田奔跑，背景化作紫色虚影，手提蓝色灯火。
shots.motion: Fast forward motion tracking the runner.

shots.lyric: 可是为什么当我看向那条发光的轨道
shots.pEn: Profile shot, scarecrow stopping, looking at the soaring amber track, high contrast, radiant light reflecting on the body.
shots.pCn: 侧拍，停下注视高耸的琥珀色轨道，强对比，光芒映射全身。
shots.motion: Quick camera stop and tilt up.

shots.lyric: 心底却有一个声音在疯狂地叫嚣
shots.pEn: Extreme close-up of eye, the silver surface ripples like water, intense amber fire spinning inside, pupils dilating.
shots.pCn: 眼部特写，银色眼面如水波动，琥珀色火焰旋转。
shots.motion: Zoom into the pupil rapidly.

shots.lyric: 你是不是比他们想象的更骄傲？
shots.pEn: Full shot, back of the scarecrow, the wind-up key spinning violently with sparks flying out, dramatic lighting from the key.
shots.pCn: 全景背影，发条钥匙疯狂旋转，火花飞溅，戏剧性光影。
shots.motion: Key rotation with high speed blurring.

shots.lyric: (Musical Break - Transition)
shots.pEn: Montage: Scarecrow traversing through a dark obsidian forest, black bandages wrapping around the body like snakes.
shots.pCn: 蒙太奇：穿梭黑曜石森林，黑色绷带如蛇般缠绕全身。
shots.motion: Quick cuts of different forest terrains.

shots.lyric: 他们经过我身边带着自诩聪明的傲慢
shots.pEn: POV shot, observing gray faceless humanoid silhouettes walking by, they are rigid and mechanical, desaturated world.
shots.pCn: 主观视角，观察灰色无面人剪影走过，僵硬机械感，无色世界。
shots.motion: Slow scan of the crowd.

shots.lyric: 讨论着得失、计算着明天的胜算
shots.pEn: Close-up on silhouettes' hands holding abacuses and gears, clunky movements, cold metallic aesthetic.
shots.pCn: 特写，剪影手持算盘和齿轮，动作滞涩，冰冷金属感。
shots.motion: Stepped, stop-motion style movement.

shots.lyric: 我却在观察一片落叶下坠的曲线
shots.pEn: Macro shot, a single glowing red leaf falling in slow motion against pitch black space, forming a streak of light, ethereal.
shots.pCn: 微距特写，一片发光的红叶在漆黑中慢动作下坠，留下光痕。
shots.motion: Fluid, elegant downward spiral.

shots.lyric: 和夕阳落下时那一抹温柔的红线
shots.pEn: Wide angle, a horizontal blood-red sun line cutting through the sky, scarecrow's body becoming translucent and glowing.
shots.pCn: 广角，地平线血色夕阳光割裂天空，身体开始半透明发光。
shots.motion: The sun line expanding slowly.

shots.lyric: 我不想要什么大脑 (Chorus 2)
shots.pEn: Epic action shot, scarecrow running under the moonlight, body bursting with amber light, tearing through the rags, dramatic sparks.
shots.pCn: 史诗动态，月下奔跑，身体爆裂琥珀光，撕碎罩衫，火星飞溅。
shots.motion: Explosive speed, ground burning under footsteps.

shots.lyric: 我宁愿在这荒野听风在麦浪里奔跑
shots.pEn: Low machine tracking shot, the heat from the scarecrow sets the dry wheat on fire, a path of flames through the darkness.
shots.pCn: 低机位跟拍，跑过的热量点燃麦田，在黑暗中开辟火路。
shots.motion: Fast tracking through rising fire.

shots.lyric: 可是为什么当我看向那条发光的轨道
shots.pEn: Close-up, the amber railway track reflected in the eyes, now occupying the entire iris, screen-space emissive glow.
shots.pCn: 特写，琥珀轨道完全占据眼球反射，全屏溢光效果。
shots.motion: Camera zooming into the eye reflection.

shots.lyric: 心底却有一个声音在疯狂地叫嚣
shots.pEn: Scarecrow's wind-up key snaps and flies off into the air, slow motion, detailed debris, inner core of light revealed.
shots.pCn: 发条钥匙崩飞向天空，慢动作，碎片细节，露出内部光核。
shots.motion: Bullet time, objects flying towards camera.

shots.lyric: 你是不是比他们想象的更重要？
shots.pEn: Portrait shot, scarecrow looking directly at camera, eyes fully replaced by swirling galaxies of fire, powerful and divine.
shots.pCn: 正面肖像，注视镜头，眼球被旋转的火焰星系取代，神性感。
shots.motion: Extreme stillness amidst flying fire particles.

shots.lyric: 如果思考是痛苦的牢 (Bridge)
shots.pEn: Wide shot, the scarecrow's body cracking from within, intense white light leaking through every crack, ink lines dissolving.
shots.pCn: 全景，身体内部裂开，万丈白光透射，水墨线条溶解。
shots.motion: Deformation and light expansion.

shots.lyric: 我愿用余生换思考
shots.pEn: Close-up on chest, the rose hole is now a pulsing core of white fire, rhythmic heartbeat animation of light.
shots.pCn: 胸口特写，玫瑰孔洞变为跳动的白火核心，光之律动。
shots.motion: High frequency pulse of emission.

shots.lyric: 哪怕代价是被烈火焚烧
shots.pEn: Extreme wide shot, the entire scene engulfed in a white-hot flash of fire, pure blinding light swallowing the darkness.
shots.pCn: 极远景，全屏被白炽火光吞噬，纯粹的强光淹没黑暗。
shots.motion: Screen fading to pure white.

shots.lyric: (Outro Break)
shots.pEn: High key lighting, a fresh green wheat field emerging from the white void, soft morning mist, peaceful and serene.
shots.pCn: 高调摄影，从纯白虚无中浮现翠绿麦田，晨雾，宁静平和。
shots.motion: Slow fade-in of landscape.

shots.lyric: 我没有大脑...
shots.pEn: Medium shot, a new form of the scarecrow made of white porcelain and gold, translucent skin, soft sunlight.
shots.pCn: 中景，白瓷与黄金材质的新形态，半透明皮肤，柔和日光。
shots.motion: Subtle head tilt, eyes opening slowly.

shots.lyric: 可我为何...感到了思考...
shots.pEn: Macro of the new eyes, ink droplets melting into a field of blooming flowers inside the iris, beautiful and deep.
shots.pCn: 新眼特写，瞳孔内墨滴化作繁花盛开，唯美而深邃。
shots.motion: Ink bleed transition animation.

shots.lyric: (Instrumental A)
shots.pEn: Wide shot, the scarecrow walking barefoot on the grass, white flowers blooming instantly where it steps, ice melting.
shots.pCn: 全景，赤脚走过草地，步履生花，冰霜消融。
shots.motion: Slow tracking of the feet.

shots.lyric: (Instrumental B)
shots.pEn: Long shot pulling back, the figure dissolving into golden dust particles, blending into the sunrise sky.
shots.pCn: 远景拉回，身影化作金色粒子，融入黎明的天空。
shots.motion: Extreme zoom out until the figure disappears.

shots.lyric: 我有灵魂
shots.pEn: Black screen, elegant handwritten calligraphy fading in: 'I Have a Soul', minimalist aesthetic.
shots.pCn: 黑屏，优雅的手写体字迹：'我有灵魂'，极简美学。
shots.motion: Text breathing fade-in.
